overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dimly lit cyberpunk ramen shop. The camera moves steadily past dining tables with patrons, approaches a neon-lit counter with Japanese signage, and ends at a back table where two characters are engaged in conversation.

events.description: patron on the left stands up from table
patron walks past camera and exits the scene

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the front dining area of the restaurant

notable_agents.action: sitting at table eating, then stands up and walks away
sitting at table eating throughout the segment

entered.detail: traditional Japanese paper lanterns with red glow hanging from ceiling

metal containers with napkins and sauces on the table
large window showing dark cityscape outside

segments.scene_description: Walking through the front dining area of a cyberpunk ramen shop. Red paper lanterns hang overhead while patrons sit at yellow tables. A person on the left stands up and walks past the camera around the 10-second mark, while another patron continues eating on the right.

events.description: counter with bar stools and illuminated signage comes into view

agents.ego_description: approaching the service counter with neon signage

notable_agents.action: sitting at counter on stool facing the kitchen
sitting at counter on stool eating

entered.detail: long counter with green neon trim and bar stools
bright orange vertical neon light strip on wall
large illuminated sign with Japanese text reading RAMEN SHOP
open kitchen visible behind the counter with staff working

segments.scene_description: Moving into the central counter area of the ramen shop. Bright neon light strips and a large illuminated RAMEN SHOP sign dominate the left side. Bar stools line the counter where patrons sit, and the kitchen is visible behind the service area. The red lanterns from the previous area are now passing overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corner with intimate table seating

events.description: camera turns toward back corner table where two people are conversing
camera slows and stops near the back table

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing two people having a conversation at a back table

notable_agents.action: person with red hair sitting at table, gesturing while talking
person with blonde hair sitting in red booth, listening and responding

entered.detail: rectangular table in dimly lit corner with two people seated
large dark metal pendant lamp hanging over the table
metal ventilation grate on the wall
large artwork or poster on back wall depicting landscape

segments.scene_description: Approaching a dimly lit back corner where two people sit at a table engaged in conversation. Industrial pendant lights hang overhead, illuminating the red-haired person gesturing while speaking to the blonde-haired person across the table. The camera slows and stops near their table, focusing on their interaction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk ramen shop that transitions from a crowded dining area to an intimate conversation in the back. It begins by gliding through the front section under red paper lanterns, passing yellow tables where patrons eat and a person stands to walk past the camera. As the movement continues, the scene shifts into the central counter area, where the soft lantern light is overtaken by bright neon strips and a large illuminated ramen shop sign. The camera then pushes past the bar stools and service area toward a dimly lit back corner, where the lighting changes to industrial pendant lamps. Finally, the motion slows and comes to a halt at a secluded table, focusing on a red-haired person gesturing while speaking to a blonde-haired companion.
